description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a node_modules/ cache and two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build-preview job that runs after the global before_script (yarn install), executes `yarn build` then `gzip -k -6 $(find build/ -type f)`, saves the build/ directory as an artifact, runs only on the master branch, and sets DEPLOY_ENV=preview. Also add a build-production job that runs the same commands, saves the same artifact, runs only on branches matching the regex ^release-.*$, and sets DEPLOY_ENV=production. In the deploy stage add a deploy-preview job that depends on build-preview, runs `yarn firebase use default` and `yarn firebase deploy --only hosting:$DEPLOY_ENV -m "Pipeline $CI_PIPELINE_ID, Build $CI_BUILD_ID" --non-interactive`, targets the preview environment at https://preview.regexper.com, runs only on master, and uses DEPLOY_ENV=preview. Finally, add a deploy-production job that depends on build-production, runs the same deploy commands, targets the production environment at https://regexper.com, runs only on ^release-.*$ branches, and sets DEPLOY_ENV=production.
